title: Manufacturing & Heavy Engineering
shortDescription: Tax, audit, inventory valuation, and cost management compliance for plant operations, engineering units, and industrial manufacturers.
fullDescription: Manufacturing operations face intricate statutory requirements including inventory accounting under AS-2 / Ind AS 2, GST job-work procedures, Section 43B(h) MSME creditor timelines, factory depreciation schedules, and multi-state supply chain tax compliance. Anil Puneet and Associates provides comprehensive audit, tax, and advisory support tailored for manufacturing enterprises.
keyChallenges: Complex raw material, WIP, and finished goods inventory valuation and scrap accounting
Compliance with GST job-work rules (Form GST ITC-04) and input credit matching across inputs and capital goods
Section 43B(h) compliance tracking for extensive raw material supplier networks
Managing high working capital requirement cycles and bank credit line monitoring
tailoredSolutions: Implementation of perpetual inventory audit procedures and cost-ledger reconciliation frameworks
Structured GST job-work movement tracking and capital goods ITC claim verification
Automated MSME vendor payment aging trackers to ensure 45-day statutory compliance
Bank CMA data preparation, working capital renewal support, and ratio analysis reporting

caseStudy.title: Inventory Audit & Working Capital Optimization for Engineering Component Manufacturer
caseStudy.context: A Gujarat-based industrial components manufacturer operating three production units required structured inventory audit procedures and GST ITC reconciliation across multi-location raw material purchases.
caseStudy.approach: Our team conducted physical inventory verification, established standard bill-of-materials (BOM) cost tracking, and performed comprehensive GSTR-2B reconciliations across supplier ledgers.
caseStudy.outcome: Identified ₹18 Lakhs in unclaimed eligible input tax credits, eliminated inventory ledger discrepancies, and structured an upgraded CMA report for enhanced bank credit facilities.
